message:
fix(ci): add write permissions to update-flake-lock workflow (PR #2642)

The workflow needs contents:write (push branch) and pull-requests:write
(create PR) for peter-evans/create-pull-request to function.

Fixes #2630

Co-Authored-By: DreadPirateRobertz <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,10 @@ on:
   schedule:
     - cron: '0 0 * * 0' # Weekly on Sunday at midnight UTC
 
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+  pull-requests: write
+
 jobs:
   update-flake-lock:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
